ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock market ticker symbol for the airline */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category or sector of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the current CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airline's official website */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airlines_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline */,
  "market_cap_date" TEXT /* Date for which the market capitalization is recorded */,
  "market_cap_value" REAL /* Market capitalization value in billions of dollars */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the market capitalization is recorded */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to USD (if applicable) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry category or sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category or sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market change record */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the market capitalization comparison */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the market capitalization comparison */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in market capitalization between the start and end dates */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the significant change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_changes_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the investor (e.g., individual investor, institutional investor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the investor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the investor */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the investor registered on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investor who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_contents" (
  "portfolio_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio content entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline invested in */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of money invested in the airline */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_contents_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_contents_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investor who set the alert */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline the alert is for */,
  "threshold_percentage" REAL /* Percentage threshold for the market change to trigger the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "performance_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the portfolio's performance */,
  "detailed_report" TEXT /* Detailed report content */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* System or user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
